examples: Recent happenings were jumbled up in her nard with events recalled from early childhood.
Men smoke and sip tea from short, slender glasses, with the clacking of nard, the local version of backgammon, as a soundtrack.
Some of them sell galbanum and nard, and curious perfumes from the islands of the Indian Sea, and the thick oil of red roses and myrrh and little nail-shaped cloves.
